title: xenophyllum decorum
intro: Xenophyllum decorum, also known as the mountain silk tree, is a flowering plant native to the high-altitude regions of Mexico and Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, and is often used to treat conditions like bronchitis and pneumonia. Herbal preparations of Xenophyllum decorum typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as teas or used as topical treatments.
